emails.subject: Re: EOL Products - Argentina
emails.body: Brent does this mean Tana should not allow any non-Argentine customers to have access to these products? The general rule has been to allow complete access unless there was a legal impediment logic regarding who will want to trade what doesn't seem to enter into it. Tana Jones 10/20/2000 09:49 AM
